title: BlanketCon '22
description: Explore a demo world for 93 Quilt-compatible 1.18.2 mods, built in collaboration with their authors! Created in a Spring 2022 event hosted by ModFest.
body:
An in-game celebration of Minecraft modding!
A collaboration between 122 modders, as hosted by ModFest.
--- **BlanketCon '22** was an in-minecraft virtual event that ran from June 11th through June 15th, 2022. This modpack contains all mods from the event - and the convention world, packed with community-made booths! **Key Features**: - Check out 92 convention "booths" built to show off mods, modpacks, and other modding projects! - Explore a gently winding lakeside campground with hills, bridges, roads, and ornate towers. - Traverse the map with snowball guns, hex wands, grappling hooks, rocket launchers, and triple jumps! - Find up to 100 uniquely textured trading cards scattered around different parts of the map! - Revisit the world where it all went down - or just check it out for the first time! - Observe a pink flamingo! (huh?)

See you again soon!
--- BlanketCon is made possible by the modding community.
A full list of credits for each showcased mod can be found on the [submissions page](https://modfest.net/bc22/submissions).
BlanketCon '22 originally ran in the spring of 2022 with in-game talks, Q&A panels, and mini-events.
Check out the [ModFest website](https://modfest.net) to see more events, or join [our discord](https://discord.gg/gn543Ee) to tour or participate in the next event live!
A playlist of video recordings from the original event is available [on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLC1qq1Hb0u1GI8919iCClzb_Bku-DrL4L).
![footer logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/blanketcon-site/main/22/images/logo.png)
